description: Configure bcWebCam's output settings to enable Remote Desktop (RDP) compatibility mode. This ensures scanned barcodes are reliably transmitted to remote sessions without dropping keystrokes. Open bcWebCam's settings/options dialog (usually the gear icon), navigate to the output or keystrokes configuration area, locate the 'Remote Desktop' or 'RDP' compatibility setting, and enable it. Leave the settings dialog open showing the enabled option, OR save a screenshot of the enabled setting to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\rdp_enabled.png.
